title: Birdie blitz powers Sundelson into last eight at SA Amateur
description: GOLF NEWS - Five birdies on the front nine...
bodyText: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Lali Stander on behalf of GolfRSA","contributorName":"Lali Stander on behalf of GolfRSA","contributorDate":"Thursday, 29 January 2026, 14:50"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Sundelson won the 2025 R&A Student Tour Series Order of Merit and has competed on the GolfRSA UK Squad Tour over the past two years. He is also a member of the GolfRSA National Squad."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - Five birdies on the front nine on Wednesday powered Judd Sundelson to a commanding 5&1 victory over Dian Kruger in the round of 16 of the South African Amateur Championship at Pretoria Country Club.","html":"GOLF NEWS - Five birdies on the front nine on Wednesday powered Judd Sundelson to a commanding 5&1 victory over Dian Kruger in the round of 16 of the South African Amateur Championship at Pretoria Country Club."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Houghton Golf Club’s Sundelson completed his undergraduate degree at the University of Nottingham and is currently studying for his Masters at the University of St Andrews - with support from The R&A.","html":"Houghton Golf Club’s Sundelson completed his undergraduate degree at the University of Nottingham and is currently studying for his Masters at the University of St Andrews - with support from The R&A."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He reeled off four consecutive birdies from the third hole to break Kruger’s resistance. Another birdie on the ninth hole piled on the pressure, and a run of steady pars through to the 14th was enough to seal his place in the quarter-finals.","html":"He reeled off four consecutive birdies from the third hole to break Kruger’s resistance. Another birdie on the ninth hole piled on the pressure, and a run of steady pars through to the 14th was enough to seal his place in the quarter-finals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sundelson won the 2025 R&A Student Tour Series Order of Merit and has competed on the GolfRSA UK Squad Tour over the past two years. He is also a member of the GolfRSA National Squad.","html":"Sundelson won the 2025 R&A Student Tour Series Order of Merit and has competed on the GolfRSA UK Squad Tour over the past two years. He is also a member of the GolfRSA National Squad."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He arrived at Pretoria Country Club in fine form, having won the Free State Open a week ago. Rounds of 67-67-70-70 earned him a share of the lead at Heron Banks Golf Club before he went on to claim victory in the play-off.","html":"He arrived at Pretoria Country Club in fine form, having won the Free State Open a week ago. Rounds of 67-67-70-70 earned him a share of the lead at Heron Banks Golf Club before he went on to claim victory in the play-off."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Golf runs deep in the Sundelson family. His grandfather, Neville Sundelson, was one of South Africa’s leading amateurs during a golden era of the sport and a highly respected coach. In fact, when Sundelson won the 2021 Houghton Club Championship, his father Barry finished second and his uncle Dean third.","html":"Golf runs deep in the Sundelson family. His grandfather, Neville Sundelson, was one of South Africa’s leading amateurs during a golden era of the sport and a highly respected coach. In fact, when Sundelson won the 2021 Houghton Club Championship, his father Barry finished second and his uncle Dean third."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"That pedigree showed as Sundelson recorded the joint-largest margin of victory in the round of 16, matched by Germany’s Morris Schiefner, who beat Jayden Jacobs 5&4."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Also progressing to the quarter-finals were England’s Ethan Roos, Minjun Heo, Ryan Melville, Ivan Verster, Schalk van Ettinger and Jonathan Wilsenach.","html":"Also progressing to the quarter-finals were England’s Ethan Roos, Minjun Heo, Ryan Melville, Ivan Verster, Schalk van Ettinger and Jonathan Wilsenach."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wilsenach edged through with the narrowest win of the round, defeating Oliver Scriven on the 19th hole. Roos beat CJ van Wyk 2&1, Heo eliminated Luxembourg’s Lenny Mines 3&1, Verster dominated Wiehan van der Walt 4&3, and Van Ettinger defeated Syan Ramchander 4&2.","html":"Wilsenach edged through with the narrowest win of the round, defeating Oliver Scriven on the 19th hole. Roos beat CJ van Wyk 2&1, Heo eliminated Luxembourg’s Lenny Mines 3&1, Verster dominated Wiehan van der Walt 4&3, and Van Ettinger defeated Syan Ramchander 4&2."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match of the day came in an all-family affair, as Melville beat his older brother 2&1. A birdie on the 17th hole proved decisive for 17-year-old Ryan, against Dylan, the elder by four years.","html":"The match of the day came in an all-family affair, as Melville beat his older brother 2&1. A birdie on the 17th hole proved decisive for 17-year-old Ryan, against Dylan, the elder by four years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Earlier in the championship, Sundelson had defeated Vuyisani Makama 2&1 in the round of 32 to book his place in the last 16.","html":"Earlier in the championship, Sundelson had defeated Vuyisani Makama 2&1 in the round of 32 to book his place in the last 16."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wiehan van der Walt had looked the most imposing player in the round of 32, recording an emphatic 8&6 win over Storm du Toit. Ryan Melville advanced with a 3&1 victory over Ethan Govender, while his brother Dylan needed 19 holes to see off Pieter Coetzee.","html":"Wiehan van der Walt had looked the most imposing player in the round of 32, recording an emphatic 8&6 win over Storm du Toit. Ryan Melville advanced with a 3&1 victory over Ethan Govender, while his brother Dylan needed 19 holes to see off Pieter Coetzee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See the scoring here.","html":"See the scoring here."},{"type":"image_with_caption","text":"Ryan Melville. Photo: GolfRSA","imageUrl":"https://cms.groupeditors.com//media/1/1///a58d0c79-3f2e-47a3-8dd8-34787d1738d3.jpg","caption":"Ryan Melville. Photo: GolfRSA"}]

images.alt: Birdie blitz powers Sundelson into last eight at SA Amateur
Birdie blitz powers Sundelson into last eight at SA Amateur
images.caption: Ryan Melville. Photo: GolfRSA

author: Lali Stander on behalf of GolfRSA
teaser: Sundelson won the 2025 R&A Student Tour Series Order of Merit and has competed on the GolfRSA UK Squad Tour over the past two years. He is also a member of the GolfRSA National Squad.
contributor: Lali Stander on behalf of GolfRSA
featuredCaption: Houghton Golf Club’s Judd Sundelson powered into the quarter-finals of the 2026 South African Amateur Championship with a dominant 5&1 win in the third round, highlighted by a blistering front nine at Pretoria Country Club. Photo: GolfRSA.
